title: SessionClient helpers should use pub(in crate::methods) not pub(super)
description: session_parts(), api_url(), and call() are marked pub(super) in methods/mod.rs. Since methods/mod.rs is the methods module itself, pub(super) = visible to crate root. The intent is that these helpers are only accessible to child modules (methods::chat, methods::space, etc.), not to crate root. pub(in crate::methods) expresses the actual intent and prevents accidental use from lib.rs or tests. Rewrite: change all three pub(super) on these helpers to pub(in crate::methods).
